title: Los viejos somos así
writer: Carlos Damel, Camilo Darthés, Joaquín Pardavé
actors: Joaquín Pardavé, Elsa Aguirre, Víctor Junco
plot: Dalia is a cabaret singer who tries to help her best friend, Lidia, get the money that her boyfriend has taken from her. For that, Dalia asks Roberto for money, without imagining the love conflicts in which she will end up involved.
